tags.description: Impressive rapids that extend for about 2 km towards the north-east on both sides of the Trollholmen island in the Piteälven river. There are paths on both sides of the island along the rapids.
tags.name: Trollforsen

tags.description: Simple nature slipway. For small light boats.
